metadata.description: UX-first CLI builder for Bun/Ink/ANSI — wizard-style planning, conditional rule loading, and project memory that compounds across sessions.

plugins.name: cli
plugins.description: Five skills for designing and building production CLIs with great UX.

skills.description: Plan + scaffold a new CLI from scratch. Wizard interview → conditional scaffold → quality review → ship checklist.
Planning session only. 5-step wizard interview → .cli/plan/ (CONTEXT.md, DECISIONS.md, PLAN.md).
Read-only analysis of an existing CLI. Architecture map, convention gaps, 5 files to read first.
Improve an existing CLI. Loads context, explores, plans, executes tasks with commits.
Distill session history into project memory (.cli/learnings/). Compounds across sessions.
